fields.title: Healthcare
fields.short_description: Improving patient outcomes through evidence-based healthcare and clinical excellence.
fields.description: Resources covering healthcare systems, clinical practice, patient care, quality improvement and health service delivery.

fields.title: Public Health
fields.short_description: Promoting healthier communities through prevention, policy and population health.
fields.description: Knowledge focused on epidemiology, disease prevention, health promotion and public health systems.

fields.title: Digital Health
fields.short_description: Transforming healthcare through technology, data and digital innovation.
fields.description: Resources covering telemedicine, electronic health records, health informatics and digital transformation.

fields.title: Research & Evidence
fields.short_description: Research methods, evidence synthesis and scientific inquiry.
fields.description: Resources focused on research methodology, evidence-based practice, clinical research and scientific writing.

fields.title: Software Engineering
fields.short_description: Designing and building reliable, scalable software systems.
fields.description: Knowledge covering software architecture, backend engineering, frontend development, APIs and DevOps.

fields.title: Data Science & Analytics
fields.short_description: Turning data into meaningful insights for informed decision-making.
fields.description: Resources covering analytics, statistics, visualization, dashboards and machine learning fundamentals.

fields.title: Artificial Intelligence
fields.short_description: Exploring intelligent systems, AI applications and emerging technologies.
fields.description: Resources on artificial intelligence, large language models, automation and responsible AI.

fields.title: Leadership & Governance
fields.short_description: Leading people, organizations and sustainable transformation.
fields.description: Knowledge covering strategic leadership, governance, organizational development and decision-making.

fields.title: Monitoring & Evaluation
fields.short_description: Measuring performance, impact and organizational effectiveness.

fields.title: Innovation & Entrepreneurship
fields.short_description: Creating solutions, products and sustainable ventures.
fields.description: Knowledge focused on innovation, entrepreneurship, product thinking and business strategy.

fields.title: Education & Learning

fields.description: Resources supporting teaching, mentorship, instructional design and lifelong learning.
